list.title: Proposals
list.subtitle: Commercial offers tied to a saved formulation version. Bundle with a spec sheet to co-sign on the kiosk.
list.org_subtitle: Every proposal in your organization. Mix products from multiple projects on the same quote.
list.empty: No proposals yet. Create one to send a priced offer to the client.
list.delete_confirm: Delete this proposal? This cannot be undone.

create.title: New proposal
create.subtitle: Pick a version and margin — we auto-suggest a unit price from the raw-material cost roll-up. Override any field manually.
create.org_subtitle: Create a proposal that can span multiple projects. Add more products from the proposal detail page.
create.price_placeholder: Unit price appears here once you enter cost and margin.
create.price_derived: Unit price: {price} = cost ÷ (1 − margin ÷ 100) — gross margin
create.specification_sheet_none: No bundled spec — proposal stands alone
create.specification_sheet_hint: Only sheets attached to the picked formulation are listed. Pick one to bundle or leave blank.
create.specification_sheet_hint_pick_formulatio: Pick a product above first — the spec list populates with sheets for that formulation.
create.invalid_input: Pick a version and fill in the quantity.

detail.share_kiosk_copy_prompt: Copy this kiosk link and share it with the client

attached_specs.title: Bundled specification sheets
attached_specs.subtitle: Exactly what the client will see alongside the proposal on their kiosk link.
attached_specs.failed: We couldn't load this specification preview. Open the spec directly to retry.

detail.edit_subtitle: Fill the customer details and commercial terms the template needs. The preview above re-renders after you save.

edit.customer_picker_hint: Pick a customer from your address book — the fields below auto-populate from their saved details. You can still override any field per proposal (e.g. a one-off delivery address).

lines.title: Products on this proposal
lines.subtitle: Each row quotes one formulation. Add more products to bundle several projects into a single signed proposal.
lines.empty: No products yet — add at least one before sending.
lines.delete_confirm: Remove this product from the proposal?
lines.add_price_hint: Unit price appears once cost + margin are filled.

missing.title: A few details are missing
missing.body: Before this proposal can move to the next state, please fill in:

fields.sales_person: Assigned sales person on the project

contract.intro: Please fill out this form to confirm the details of your order. Please find the products that you have requested listed in the table below along with relevant prices.
contract.preamble_1: We hereby confirm receipt of your request regarding your supplement contract manufacture, and we would like to thank you for your confidence in us.
contract.preamble_2: This formula does not require a laboratory development phase, as its manufacturing process validated has been validated.

timelines.title: Timelines
timelines.lead_time: A lead time of around 2 - 6 weeks has to be taken into account.

contract.pricing_intro: Please find below our commercial price for the manufacture of your product(s) according to the formula agreement enclosed or attached as Product Technical Document:

lines.empty: No products on this proposal yet.

conditions.title: Conditions:
conditions.delivery: Delivery: DAP UK location only, EXW International
conditions.no_other_services: No other services or analytical services

offer_validity.title: Offer Validity and Pricing
offer_validity.body: This offer is valid for 14 days. Prices are subject to change due to fluctuations in raw material costs, which are beyond our control. If raw material costs increase, prices will be recalculated accordingly.

raw_materials.title: Raw Materials and Product Quality
raw_materials.body_1: Made from natural components, some products may exhibit slight colour variations between batches. These variations are a natural characteristic of the materials used and do not affect the quality of our products.
raw_materials.body_2: Each product is assigned a unique Batch Number that is tracked through all stages of manufacturing and delivery. This ensures accuracy during production and at Quality Control checks.

stability.title: Formulation and Product Stability
stability.body: Vita Manufacture can provide advice concerning formulation stability. If full stability testing is required, additional charges will apply. You are legally responsible for your product's formulation and stability. A "best before" date will be provided after the development stage as part of the label guidelines and approval process.

legality.title: Responsibilities for Product Legality and Labelling
legality.body: Vita Manufacture Ltd, as the manufacturer, assumes no responsibility for the legality of your product's formulation, labelling, presentation, promotion, or marketing. Your product label must not include Vita Manufacture's name or address. We strongly recommend seeking professional guidance from relevant regulatory authorities, such as: Health Food Manufacturers Association, Medicines and Healthcare Regulatory Agency, Food Standards Agency and Trading Standards.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.body_1: Vita Manufacture terms and conditions apply for all orders. Vita Manufacture General Terms and Conditions (T&C's) are available on https://www.vitamanufacture.co.uk/termsandcondition. Extract of T&C's is included in this document. In the event of a conflict between this offer and the T&C's, the T&C's will prevail and control.
terms.body_2: If you decide to contract with us, we kindly ask you to return this offer, and the formula agreement (Draft Product Specification Sheet) countersigned and dated to us. Upon receipt of these documents, planning for preparation of the samples will be confirmed.
terms.body_3: The information included in this document is established according to the current European Regulation. It's our customer's responsibility to check that the use and conditions of use of their product are conforming to their activities segment and geographical sales areas. Vita Manufacture manufactures and releases batches for further operations. The batches are produced according to ISO 22000:2018 standards, Good Manufacturing Practice (GMP) standards, the European legislation for Food Supplements and Food Safety Agency UK. For one year, as of the date of your first order, Vita Manufacture shall be the exclusive manufacturer of the products and references mentioned in this offer.
terms.vat: Vita Manufacture will apply VAT to all commercial products delivered to any UK address where VAT is applicable.

closing.help: We will be pleased to assist you with any additional questions or queries.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.intro: Please complete this form to agree to the Terms & Conditions and confirm the above:
acceptance.item_1: I understand that before label printing, Production Specification Sheets must be signed, and label designs must be reviewed and approved. Placing an order initiates the development phase, during which Product Specification Sheets are finalized, and label guidelines are provided to facilitate label design, review, and approval.
acceptance.item_2: I understand that manufacturing lead times commence once the Product Specification Sheet(s) are signed and not before.
acceptance.item_3: I have read the terms and Conditions which can be found below.

signature.customer_hint: Sign below to accept this Acceptance Form and the commercial terms above.

public.banner: This is a shareable preview link. You're identified by the name you entered on arrival; every signature is audit-logged.
public.finalize_hint: Sign every document below to finish. Nothing advances until all signatures are in.
public.finalize_ready: Every document is signed. Click Finish to complete the deal.

doc.sign_disabled_hint: Tick every consent below before signing.
doc.ack_spec_signing: I understand that before label printing, Production Specification Sheets must be signed, and label designs must be reviewed and approved.
doc.ack_lead_times: I understand that manufacturing lead times depend on raw-material availability, packaging supply, and approval timing of the spec sheets and labels.
doc.ack_terms: I have read the Terms and Conditions which can be found below.

sign_dialog.subtitle: Draw your signature to confirm you've reviewed this document. You'll sign each document separately.
